name: Jamaica Pawn Inc
description_short: Jamaica Pawn Inc is a Queens-based pawnbroker offering instant cash loans ($100-$50,000) against jewelry, watches, gold, and valuables with New York's capped interest rates.
description_long:
Jamaica Pawn Inc has operated as a pawnbroker in Queens, New York since 1980, establishing itself as a trusted local lender for over 40 years. The company moved to 145-16 Jamaica Avenue in Jamaica, Queens in January 2021 and offers collateral-based loans and outright purchases of valuable items. They specialize in jewelry (designer, estate, antique), precious metals (gold in various karats, platinum), diamonds, colored gemstones, luxury watches (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe), and sterling silver items from brands like Tiffany & Co and David Yurman. The company accepts items from local customers and also facilitates remote transactions via mail, with free return shipping if customers reject offers or choose to redeem items at loan maturity.

Jamaica Pawn's core service model involves providing immediate cash advances secured by tangible assets, with no credit check required. Loans range from $100 to $50,000, and the company guarantees approval regardless of credit status. They employ certified gemologists to provide free appraisals and expert valuations. New customers between January 28 and February 28, 2021 received interest-free loans for the first month. The company advertises New York's favorable regulatory environment, where pawn shop interest rates are capped at a maximum of 4% annually—among the lowest in the nation. Customers can sell items outright or use them as collateral for loans with defined redemption periods.

Jamaica Pawn distinguishes itself through several operational advantages. They explicitly market the ability to work with out-of-state customers via mail, offering free shipping both ways and a satisfaction guarantee that includes free return shipping if the customer rejects an offer. The business emphasizes professionalism, privacy, and personalized service, with trained loan consultants and certified gemologists handling valuations. Their location near Jamaica Station in Queens provides accessibility and convenient parking. They claim to "pawn, buy, and sell everything," suggesting willingness to work with items beyond traditional jewelry categories.

The company presents a legitimate pawn shop operation compliant with New York State regulations and offers genuine value through low interest rates and professional gemological assessment. However, potential borrowers should recognize that pawn loans are fundamentally short-term debt instruments requiring repayment or item forfeiture, and the website provides limited detail on loan terms, redemption periods, or actual interest rate specifics beyond the state maximum. The company's marketing language emphasizes cash accessibility rather than financial planning, and customers should carefully review loan agreements before proceeding.
pros: New York State maximum 4% interest rate cap—among the lowest pawn shop rates nationally
Free expert appraisals by certified gemologist with no obligation
Accepts remote transactions nationwide with free two-way shipping and satisfaction guarantee
No credit check required; guaranteed approval regardless of credit history
Wide range of acceptable collateral: jewelry, gold, platinum, diamonds, luxury watches, and sterling silver
Established 40+ year operating history in Queens (since 1980) builds local credibility
Interest-free first month promotional loans for new customers during specified periods
cons: Pawn loans are inherently short-term debt requiring repayment or loss of collateral; not a sustainable financial solution
Website lacks clarity on specific loan terms, redemption periods, and actual interest rates charged below the 4% state maximum
Phone number on website appears incomplete or potentially incorrect (718) 739-606 vs. full number (718) 739-6060
Website copy suggests willingness to pawn 'everything' but provides limited detail on what non-jewelry items qualify
No mention of loan-to-value ratios, typical loan amounts by item category, or repayment timeline flexibility
best_for: People needing immediate cash ($100-$50,000) who own jewelry, watches, or precious metals and want to avoid credit checks
Out-of-state customers with valuable items who prefer remote transaction options with mail-based appraisal and shipping
Borrowers seeking the lowest available interest rates (4% max) compared to alternative short-term lenders
diagnosis: Jamaica Pawn Inc is best suited for consumers with valuable tangible assets (jewelry, watches, precious metals) who need emergency cash quickly and have poor or no credit history, or who prefer the rates available under New York State's favorable pawn shop regulations. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are short-term debt instruments secured by collateral forfeiture—not sustainable personal finance solutions—and borrowers should fully understand redemption timelines and repayment obligations before pledging items.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans ($100-$50,000) with no credit check required
Outright purchase of jewelry, gold, silver, diamonds, and watches
Free expert appraisals by certified gemologist
Gold and platinum buying and loaning (multiple karat weights)
Diamond and colored gemstone appraisal and lending
Luxury watch collateral loans (Rolex, Cartier, Patek Philippe)
Sterling silver appraisal and purchase (Tiffany & Co., David Yurman brands)
Remote transaction services with nationwide mail-in appraisal
Free return and redemption item shipping
Satisfaction guarantee with free return shipping on rejected offers
